title: ophrys × delvauxiorum
intro: Ophrys × delvauxiorum, also known as Delvaux's bee orchid, is a hybrid species of orchid that is a cross between Ophrys delvauxii and Ophrys insectifera. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × delvauxiorum are said to include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these preparations.
